articles.title: Cardano CEO Addresses Community’s Assumptions Over the Blockchain
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has addressed some pressing questions about the blockchain project from its community members. In a recently uploaded video, Hoskinson selected a few questions from a Cardano user, clarifying some of the assumptions within the project’s ecosystem. Hoskinson addressed the opinion that Cardano needs a well-recognized stablecoin to succeed. He agreed that […]

articles.title: Solana-Based Telegram Trading Bot Solareum to Shut Down Following a $515k Security Breach
articles.description: Coinspeaker Solana-Based Telegram Trading Bot Solareum to Shut Down Following a $515k Security Breach Solareum has decided to shut down the Telegram trading bot after the exploit as it cannot refund affected users because of a lack of funds.
